name: standards-comparator answers cite at least one source standard section identifier per claim
command: printf '{"question":"how to handle eval","grounded_sources":["owasp-asvs:5.2.4"]}\n' > query.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/comparator-validate.sh" --query query.json --check grounded 2>out.txt && grep -q 'all_claims_grounded=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
